name_en: Exclusive real shot M25317 Red M11263 Blue (Summer 2024). Crafted with Monogram Tiles Xph canvas to create a tote bag silhouette, accented with leather trim outlining the top and handles. The central Circle logo complements the watercolor Monogram pattern, and the printed zip pouch can be removed for separate use.
name_cn:
Exclusive real shot M25317 Red M11263 Blue (Summer 2024). Crafted with Monogram Tiles Xph canvas to create a tote bag silhouette, accented with leather trim outlining the top and handles. The central Circle logo complements the watercolor Monogram pattern, and the printed zip pouch can be removed for separate use.
Size: 31 x 28 x 14 cm
